full_text:
Yuan Kan (Gonran)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yuan Kan, styledGonran, was born in Fule in Chen. Virtuous and popular, initially refused to take office. Yuan Kan was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty.
